# Daily Report — 2026-06-08

## Task Completed
Added `close_incident_task` tool to `incident_task_tools.py`. The tool PATCHes
an sc_task record to state=3 (Closed Complete). Accepts an sc_task number
(e.g. TASK0010001) or a 32-character sys_id; performs a lookup GET only when
a number is supplied. Optional `close_notes` and `work_notes` fields are
forwarded in the PATCH body. A 404 response from the PATCH is surfaced as a
clean not-found error. Registered in `service_desk` and `full` tool packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1492
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Vulnerabilities in transitive dependencies only (pyjwt, setuptools, urllib3,
wheel) — no issues in project code.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported and registered `close_incident_task`
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `service_desk` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_close_incident_task.py` — 11 new tests
